title: senecio serra var. serra
intro: Senecio serra var. serra, also known as the mountain ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Senecio serra var. serra include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
